revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月初六]][[zh:四月初六]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 6|qq=April 6}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Shangwu|ja|章武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shangwu|1=Zhangwu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8011668}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|221|en|221|qid=Q30320|lt=221|1=221}} {{ill|May 14|en|May 14|qid=Q2561|lt=May 14|1=May 14}}) – {{ill|Liu Bei|en|Liu Bei|qid=Q245315|lt=Liu Bei|1=Liu Bei}} became Emperor{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. {{ill|Shu|en|Shu|qid=Q34753|lt=Shu|1=Shu}} was established. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|qid=Q2545|lt=May 2|1=May 2}}) – {{ill|Sakuma Shōzan|en|Sakuma Shōzan|qid=Q739298|lt=Sakuma Shōzan|1=Sakuma Shōzan}} was implicated and imprisoned along with his disciple {{ill|Yoshida Shōin|en|Yoshida Shōin|qid=Q559747|lt=Yoshida Shōin|1=Yoshida Shōin}} due to a failed attempt at smuggling to America. == Births == == Deaths == * {{ill|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|ja|正暁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1069086}} 5th year / {{ill|Engen|en|Engen|qid=Q1194159|lt=Engen|1=Engen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|qid=Q6028|lt=1336|1=1336}} {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|qid=Q2575|lt=May 17|1=May 17}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Fushimi|en|Emperor Go-Fushimi|qid=Q440454|lt=Later Fushimi Emperor|1=Emperor Go-Fushimi}}, the 93rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|1288|en|1288|qid=Q5550|lt=1288|1=1288}}). * {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 15th year / {{ill|Enbun|en|Enbun|qid=Q1145071|lt=Enbun|1=Enbun}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1360|en|1360|qid=Q6150|lt=1360|1=1360}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|qid=Q2525|lt=April 21|1=April 21}}) – {{ill|Tōin Kinkata|en|Tōin Kinkata|qid=Q11555868|lt=Tōin Kōken|1=Tōin Kinkata}}, a {{ill|Minister (government)|en|Minister (government)|qid=Q83307|lt=Daijō-daijin|1=Minister (government)}} and scholar of {{ill|Yushoku Kojitsu|ja|有職故実|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yushoku Kojitsu|1=Yūsoku Kojitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1623327}} (born {{ill|1291|en|1291|qid=Q5554|lt=1291|1=1291}}). * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1534|en|1534|qid=Q6447|lt=1534|1=1534}} {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}}) – {{ill|Satomi Yoshitoyo|ja|里見義豊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satomi Yoshitoyo|1=Satomi Yoshitoyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644666}}, a {{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku Daimyo|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5384684}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1561|en|1561|qid=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|qid=Q2589|lt=May 29|1=May 29}}) – {{ill|Masaki Tokishige|ja|正木時茂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masaki Tokishige|1=Masaki Tokishige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545504}}, a {{ill|Sengoku warrior|ja|戦国武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku warrior|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 武将|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} and retainer of the {{ill|Satomi clan|en|Satomi clan|qid=Q2975367|lt=Satomi clan|1=Satomi clan}}. * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1823|en|1823|qid=Q6988|lt=1823|1=1823}} {{ill|May 16|en|May 16|qid=Q2574|lt=May 16|1=May 16}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nanpo|en|Ōta Nanpo|qid=Q386183|lt=Ota Nan-Ō|1=Ōta Nanpo}}, a {{ill|playwright|ja|戯作者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/playwright|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 戯作|1=Gesaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1047433}} (born {{ill|1749|en|1749|qid=Q7607|lt=1749|1=1749}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|qid=Q2587|lt=May 27|1=May 27}}) <ref>Deathsは閏4月6日。閏年であり、4月が閏月である。</ref> – {{ill|Oguri Kozukenosuke|en|Oguri Kozukenosuke|qid=Q6526468|lt=Oguri Tadanobu|1=Oguri Kozukenosuke}}, a retainer (born {{ill|1827|en|1827|qid=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|5|4|7|3|6|5|4|0406|qq=}} *
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
